name: Crown PropTech Acquisitions
summary: PARTI Business Crown PropTech Acquisitions (Crown, us, we or the Company) is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company on September24, 2020. The Company was incorporated for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses (a business combination). The Company is not limited to a particular industry or sector for purposes of consummating a business combina...
